stemHtml: Which of the following will be used by ATC to establish LONGITUDINAL separation?

options.a: provides aircraft to hold over a geographical location until a specified time.
options.b: provides a 2 minute separation when aircraft fly at the same FL through the same track.
options.c: provides a 5 minute separation when aircraft fly in the same FL and a cross track exists.
options.d: provides aircraft with a 2 nm longitudinal separation.
